26 great quotes about leadership and teamwork

# 26 great quotes about leadership and teamwork

4min

Get insights

TestGorilla staff

[]()[]( Teamwork represents the foundations for a prosperous company, while leadership is required to instigate cooperation. Working as a team will drive the success of a business, increasing productivity, performance, and profit.

All teams need leaders – not to micromanage or intimidate, but to guide and foster a productive atmosphere. Leadership skills involve motivating and encouraging your team effectively, without acting like you’re above them. **A good leader is simply another member of their team.**

To sum up, a successful business will place value on teamwork and leadership, recognizing the two as driving factors for continued success.

## 26 inspiring leadership and teamwork quotes

There are many inspirational quotes out there regarding leadership and teamwork. Titans of industry and prominent world figures have all had their say on what it is to be a leader and how teamwork is the only true driving force behind success.

We’ve gathered a selection of our favorites and listed them here, so you can use them to inspire your team to achieve future greatness.

## The best insights on HR and recruitment, delivered to your inbox.

Biweekly updates. No spam. Unsubscribe any time.

## Quotes to encourage teamwork

1. “I’ve never scored a goal in my life without getting a pass from someone else.” **– Abby Wambach**
 
2. “Tough times don’t last. Tough teams do.” **– Robert Schuller**
 
3. “Great things in business are never done by one person; they’re done by a team of people.” **– Steve Jobs**
 
4. “No individual can win a game by himself.” **– Pelé**
 
5. “If everyone is moving forward together, then success takes care of itself.” **– Henry Ford**
 
6. “I can do things you cannot, you can do things I cannot: together we can do great things.” **– Mother Teresa**
 
7. “Talent wins games, but teamwork and intelligence win championships.” **– Michael Jordan**
 
8. “You don’t win alone. That’s just how it is.” **– Tobio Kageyama**
 
9. “It is amazing what you can accomplish if you do not care who gets the credit.” **– Harry Truman**
 
10. “If I have seen further, it is by standing on the shoulders of giants.” **– Isaac Newton**
 
11. “No one can whistle a symphony. It takes a whole orchestra to play it.” **– H. E. Luccock**
 
12. “Alone we can do so little; together we can do so much.” **– Helen Keller**
 
13. “Teamwork is the ability to work together toward a common vision. The ability to direct individual accomplishments toward organizational objectives. It is the fuel that allows common people to attain uncommon results.” **– Andrew Carnegie**
 
14. “We rise by lifting others.” **– Robert Ingersoll**

## Quotes to inspire hard work and dedication

1. “When the ideas are coming, I don’t stop until the ideas stop because that train doesn’t come along all the time.” **– Dr. Dre**
 
2. “Diamonds are nothing more than chunks of coal that stuck to their jobs.” **– Malcolm Forbes**
 
3. “You never change your life until you step out of your comfort zone; change begins at the end of your comfort zone.” **– Roy T. Bennett**
 
4. “Hard work beats talent, if talent doesn’t work hard.” **– Tim Notke**
 
5. “Satisfaction lies in the effort, not in the attainment.” **– Mahatma Gandhi**
 
6. “Success isn’t always about greatness. It’s about consistency. Consistent hard work leads to success. Greatness will come.” **– Dwayne Johnson**
 

## Quotes about leadership

1. “The way to achieve your own success is to be willing to help somebody else get it first.” **– Iyanla Vanzant**
 
2. “The first responsibility of a leader is to define reality. The last is to say thank you. In between, the leader is a servant.” **– Max De Pree**
 
3. “The best executive is the one who has sense enough to pick good men to do what he wants done, and self-restraint enough to keep from meddling with them while they do it.” **– Theodore Roosevelt**
 
4. “Great leaders are almost always great simplifiers, who can cut through argument, debate, and doubt to offer a solution everybody can understand.” **– General Colin Powell**
 
5. “If your actions inspire others to dream more, learn more, do more, and become more, you are a leader.” – **John Quincy Adams**
 
6. “Leadership and learning are indispensable to each other.” **– John F. Kennedy**

## Job roles where you need strong leadership

Leadership styles vary, but every team needs a leader. And exceptional leadership skills are valued, naturally, in management roles. The ability to take executive decisions and be confident in them is essential, but it’s the capacity to foster productive teamwork among your colleagues that’s truly decisive.

Strong leadership skills are particularly necessary for roles that deal with a large team, such as hotel managers and other hospitality roles. People management is vital, so you need to hire the right people for the job.

## Job roles where teamwork is important

There are virtually no roles that don’t require teamwork in some shape or form. The ability to work harmoniously with others is important when hiring for any position, from software test engineers to contact center operatives.

Incidentally, teamwork is particularly important in IT jobs because it takes a whole group of people to build and maintain various software, tech, servers, and systems. IT workers have to communicate and cooperate effectively.
